arts.ttl: Man City fend off Real Madrid and Inter Milan for LaLiga starlet
arts.sum: “Yesterday afternoon, Abdulai Juma Bah and his agent communicated to Real Valladolid his intention to unilaterally break the contract that binds both parties. Several European clubs have shown an interest in Juma Bah this season - in England, Newcastle United and Leicester City as well as City, Inter Milan in Serie A, Fenerbahçe in Turkey and Real Madrid, who have close ties to Valladolid through Ronaldo Nazário, have also been monitoring his progress.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Red Bull Salzsburg, 2025 Champions League
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Red Bull Salzsburg in the UEFA Champions League . It will be interesting to monitor Valverde’s performance on the right side of the defensive line, as Red Bull Salzsburg will surely try to take advantage of his lack of experience in that spot.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Makes Financial History: A Billion-Euro Powerhouse
arts.sum: According to Football Benchmark’s 2025 European Champions Report, which evaluates the business performance of domestic champions from six major European leagues (Inter, Manchester City, Paris Saint-Germain, PSV Eindhoven, Real Madrid, and Sporting CP), club has set a new standard for financial excellence during the 2023-24 season. Real Madrid has solidified its position as a global leader in football, achieving an extraordinary milestone as the first club to surpass €1 billion in operating revenue.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs RB Salzburg LIVE: Possible lineups and latest news
arts.sum: Good evening everybody and welcome to another MARCA in English live blog, this time taking you through the Champions League clash between Real Madrid and RB Salzburg from the Santiago Bernabeu. Two winnable games remain, with Salzburg's struggling form providing a prime opportunity for Real Madrid to assert their dominance.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland responds to Real Madrid and Barcelona question after signing new contract
arts.sum: Manchester City forward Erling Haaland has stated that the club ‘feels like home’ following a new 9.5-year deal, which would keep him at the club until 2034. The deal is believed to make him the highest-paid player in European football, but his long-term future is not entirely settled depending on who you speak to. arts.ttl: Liverpool plan to sign Real Madrid star to replace Salah
arts.sum: If Mo Salah leaves Liverpool this summer, the Reds plan to sign Rodrygo from Real Madrid as his replacement. Liverpool plan to sign Real Madrid star to replace Salah
